TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == numilenemay i nanum nu balungaanÊΩõËâ¶ == milenemay i nanum nu balungaan, pangangan han u milenemay i nanum nu balungaan, taneng i nananuman muculilay nu balungaan. yadah ku masadumaay nu milenemay i nanum nu balungaan, caay namin kalecad, saadidiay u kikayay atu tusaay a tademaw ku pacunaay, pisakakawawan nu tukian a adidiay nu sapilenem piadihan, anu tabaki taneng mitupin tu pinaay nu lasubuan nu tademaw, matulin ku nuculilan nu balungan makaala tu tulu ‚Äìenem a buladan nu E'-luo-se baliyusan nu sapilenem tu nanum a balungaan. u udip nu balunga makakenih sa " angangan un hitay" adidi a tudi atu adidiay " masaadidi'tu nu milenemay tu nanum a balungaan, sapilenem nu kikayan" atu sakatasasa i nanum nu ziting a kikayan. sakay bayu nu sapilenem utiih a kiliman, sapilenem i nanum nu balungaan yu mahida idaw tu nu miculimekay mitupinay a balungaan. . tabakiay nu pileneman a balungaan u mamulmulay namin ku cuked, taban nu balunga idaw ku nipatideng tu sasedayan nu kakuan " sakaypaypay", sumamad pangangan han u " pitudawan", paypay u yadahay nu mapatelekay a masasalusalusay nu hekal, sumamad u masakayakayay, ilabu idaw ku sapatelay i hekal, tiyung han masuni tu, sapiadih tu batad nu dadingu atu sapikuwan naw a sangaan. . sakinacacay nu nikalepacawan, sapilenemaw i nanum nu balungaan sawsawni cukaymasan, mikawaw tu tabakiay nu kaygungan a angangangan, sakay miedis tu ada nu hitayan a balungaan atu sapilenemaw i nanum nu balungaan, sapidiputaw tu macapiay, mipeci' tu nipitengan, mikinsa atu sapaceba tu micidekay nu muculilay nu hitayan. milenemay nu balungaan alahican caay sipakayda i nu hitayan a micukaymas. mahida u sakay bayuan nu pikinkiwan, mamialaw tu tuu'dan, mikutkut tu sakay ilabuay nu nanuman, kesye pikiliman, sapidiputaw a tuudan, sapikilim miala, sakay sasa nu bayu misangan tu tabakiay nu telay, pacakayay tu dukuan, sakay nanum nu miliwkuay, sakaycudadan nu nipikisaan, u tada kalimucisangay a tademaw micukaymas tu sapileneman nu balungaan tu sakay nanum nu mabulaway a lumaan. . hatidaay tu nu nananuman a balungaan saan u sakay lepacawan a duguan, itini i nipiwada tu hitay atu nipicunus tu hitayan a nikasasakamuan u angangan ku nuheni. mikinkiw tina sapilenem nu balungaan a talakaw atu mahamin a kugayan, ayda caay tu ka pina ku misikiay nu kanatalan atu misangaay tu sakay hitayan nu balungaan. . sakalahat nu likisiÁôºÂ±ïÊ≠∑Âè≤ sumamad nu likisiÊó©ÊúüÊ≠∑Âè≤ sayaway a sapilenemaw nu balungaan taneng patalaayaw ku sausi i 15‚Äî16 a secian nu Li-aw-na-tuo. Ta-wen-si. sakamusa ci nida tu nisimsiman " taneng i nananuman muculilay nu balungaan". nika mahiniay saan kutaw u " la'cusay", sisa caay pisiki ci nida tu mahiniay a pikulitan. Katukuh i kalepacawan, mahiniay nu balungaan pala " caay kaw kapahay nu waywayan" nu sakalepacaw duguan, hakiya cumudan tu mikukungay i labu nu balungaan. . sabaw enem nu secian, tatengaay a imian nu sakay nanum nu balungaan tahekal tu. caylimpicwal mihcaan , miasipay nu sitangahay a tademaw nu In-kuo ci Wi-len.Puon a cudadan " mikinkiw atu misiki" sakamusa tu sapilenemaw tu nanum nu balungaan. caylimtusep mihcaan, sayaway idaw ku sisulitay " taneng sakay nanumay nu balungaan" " submerible vehicles" u iluc nu He-lan In-kuo a tademaw ci Ke-ni-li-e'-s.Ya-pu-se-cung,Tay-puo-e ku patidengay, miduducay tu angangan nu nipisikian, micuduh u tademaw ku misakakawaway. saan ku duma a tademaw uyda u " sakay sasa nu namum nu masuniay a linlin sa" caay kaw u tatengaay a sakay nanum nu balungaan, idaw ku tusaay nisumadan itida i caylimlusep mihcaan atu caylimtusip mihcaan itida i Tay-u-se nanuman mikinkiw. tusepseptu mihcaan, In-kuo kusi tahekal i tilibi sakamusa "Building the Impossible", ci Ma-ke.Ay-de-hua-ce kusi sakamusa tu tawyaay a nipisikian tu nipatideng nu tusaay a tademawan a Tay-puo-e balungaan, malaheci muculil itida i Yi-tun a Duo-ni-banawan. 16‰∏ñÁ¥Ä, "(submerible vehicles) "Building the Impossible"‰∏≠, . "taneng i nanumay nu balungaan, taneng miadih tu sasa nu kitakidan a tuudan, nika sakay nu hitayan amelik kaadihan tu. caylimsipwal mihcaan, u kiwsama ci Ye-han. Wi-e-cin-se nicudadan " sapiasip nu tizinaan" "Mathematical Magic" saan tu sakay leneman nu balungan nu hitayan a nikakapah: sakaya nu udipan: mutayda i dumaan nu capian a kitakidan, caay ka adih nu taw. sakay anzing : u miubiay atu kukung utiih a tasasa mialaw tu tuud nu balungaan: ka kelahan atu picidekan nu bali atu udad caay ka lawlaw nu sasaay a bayuan tu 25-30 kun-ce, kasisuledaan atu atekakay nu suledaan caay pakaedis tu balungaay nu tademaw, kanahatu i timul wali nu bayuan. idaw ku laheci miwawies tu ada nu kaygung, mipeci' atu paenep tu balungan.miedap tu malawaay nu nanum atu micapiay tu nanuman, naynai' ku sunisuni patayda tu tuudan. " . itini i likisi saayaway nu micukaymasay nu hitay a milenemay nu balungaan itini i Amilika tu nika sacacay sa malepacaw. Amilika nu Ye-lu tabakiay nu cacudadan a ci Ta-wi. Pu-si-e ku patidengay tu Hay-kua-haw, ilabu cacay ku tademaw ku mipacunaay tu handulu atu kulupila. caypicpiclim mihcaan, ina hay-kua-haw midebung milepacaw tu Ing-kuo-hun-cia kaygung nu law-ing-haw "HMS Eagle", nika mademec. Itini i liksian malaheciay namibakuhac tu balungaan itida i Amilika nu timul amis a nikalepacawan. ci He-zue-se.Law-sen.Han-li patideng tu han-li-haw pileneman nu balungaan, mikacaway nu tademaw walu ku tademaw, limaen nanay ku sapacuna. i nu ayawan idaw ku muculalay nu sapibakuhac nu lacuna, anu lalitemuh sa mabakuhac tu. caywallimsip mihacan tusa bulad caypic demiad labii siwaay ku tuki, malaheci nida mabakuhac malenem ku amisay a haw-sa'-tuo-ni-haw "USS Housatonic" nu hu-wi-balungaan, nika ci nida mabakuhac tu malaadiyuc lenem satu. (HMS Eagle),‰ΩÜÂ§±Êïó. . nu ayawan a caywallimlu mihcaan, Fa-kuo mipadeng tu sapipenecaw tu bali a kawawan misumad tu tademaw, patideng tu sayaway nu balungaan tu caaayay kaw u tademaw ku mikawaway nu balungaan "milenemay tu nanum a haw". caywalpicsiw mihcaan, buksi nu Ing-kuo ci Ciw-se.Cia-le-te' patideng tu "hu-huo-haw", tanayu makaala tu 15 mi, teban u makimulmulay a kakuan, tasay a tapiingan makimulmulay nu kakuan. anu muculil i nanum u lahud ku sapicuduh, anu milenem tu u sasangasiban nu liwan a lahud, nu sayaway a akutiay nu saculi a milenemay nu balungaan. Ê≠§ÂâçÁöÑ1863Âπ¥, . sabaw siwa a seci walu a bataan nu mihcaan, kapah kapah ku nipisangan tu sapilenem nu balungaan, mamin tu matineng ku kanakanatal tu tapangan. Amilika, Ing-kuo,Fa-kuo,Zue-tin, Yi-ta-li, De-kuo atu E'-kuo manamuh namin mikinkiw. caywalpicwal mihcaan, Ing-kuo iluc nu Amilika ci Ye-han. Hei-li-pu.Huo-lan mikabu tina kawawan. caysiwsepsep mihcaan sepat a bulad, Amilika syehu micakay tu nipikinkiwan a sapilenem nu balungaan u huo-lan-haw, malaAmilika nu kaygungan. namahini, hidasatu malakayngung nu balungaan. caywalsiwwal mihcaan, Fa-kuo ci Ma-ke'-si-mu. Law-puo-hu saayaway misanga tu tusaay a udipan nu balungaan misangan " yi-ciaw-cin-hau", misuped tu nanum i labu nu tusaay a tungduhan, sakapahay sa sapicunus tu sakabawbaw. uynihan mala Su-e' pileneman nu balungaan. 19‰∏ñÁ¥Ä80Âπ¥‰ª£, .
S.PHON: == numir~…æ…ôn…ômaj i nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan** == mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj i nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, pa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan u mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj i nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, tan…ô≈ã i nananuman mu ¶ur~…æir~…æaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. jadaƒß ku masadumaaj nu mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj i nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, ¶aaj namin kar~…æ…ô ¶ad, saadidiaj u kikajaj atu tusaaj a tad…ômaw ku pa ¶unaaj, pisakakawawan nu tukian a adidiaj nu sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm piadiƒßan, anu tabaki tan…ô≈ã mitupin tu pinaaj nu r~…æasubuan nu tad…ômaw, matur~…æin ku nu ¶ur~…æir~…æan nu bar~…æu≈ãan makaar~…æa tu tur~…æu *…ôn…ôm a bur~…æadan nu …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô bar~…æijusan nu sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm tu nanum a bar~…æu≈ãaan. u udip nu bar~…æu≈ãa makak…ôniƒß sa " a≈ãa≈ãan un ƒßitaj" adidi a tudi atu adidiaj " masaadidi î~ °tu nu mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj tu nanum a bar~…æu≈ãaan, sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm nu kikajan" atu sakatasasa i nanum nu ziti≈ã a kikajan. sakaj baju nu sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm utiiƒß a kir~…æiman, sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm i nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan ju maƒßida idaw tu nu mi ¶ur~…æim…ôkaj mitupinaj a bar~…æu≈ãaan. . tabakiaj nu pir~…æ…ôn…ôman a bar~…æu≈ãaan u mamur~…æmur~…æaj namin ku ¶uk…ôd, taban nu bar~…æu≈ãa idaw ku nipatid…ô≈ã tu sas…ôdajan nu kakuan " sakajpajpaj", sumamad pa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan u " pitudawan", pajpaj u jadaƒßaj nu mapat…ôr~…æ…ôkaj a masasar~…æusar~…æusaj nu ƒß…ôkar~…æ, sumamad u masakajakajaj, ir~…æabu idaw ku sapat…ôr~…æaj i ƒß…ôkar~…æ, tiju≈ã ƒßan masuni tu, sapiadiƒß tu batad nu dadi≈ãu atu sapikuwan naw a sa≈ãaan. . sakina ¶a ¶aj nu nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, sapir~…æ…ôn…ômaw i nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan sawsawni ¶ukajmasan, mikawaw tu tabakiaj nu kajgu≈ãan a a≈ãa≈ãa≈ãan, sakaj mi…ôdis tu ada nu ƒßitajan a bar~…æu≈ãaan atu sapir~…æ…ôn…ômaw i nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, sapidiputaw tu ma ¶apiaj, mip…ô ¶i î~ ° tu nipit…ô≈ãan, mikinsa atu sapa ¶…ôba tu mi ¶id…ôkaj nu mu ¶ur~…æir~…æaj nu ƒßitajan. mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan ar~…æaƒßi ¶an ¶aaj sipakajda i nu ƒßitajan a mi ¶ukajmas. maƒßida u sakaj bajuan nu pikinkiwan, mamiar~…æaw tu tuu î~ °dan, mikutkut tu sakaj ir~…æabuaj nu nanuman, k…ôsj…ô pikir~…æiman, sapidiputaw a tuudan, sapikir~…æim miar~…æa, sakaj sasa nu baju misa≈ãan tu tabakiaj nu t…ôr~…æaj, pa ¶akajaj tu dukuan, sakaj nanum nu mir~…æiwkuaj, sakaj ¶udadan nu nipikisaan, u tada kar~…æimu ¶isa≈ãaj a tad…ômaw mi ¶ukajmas tu sapir~…æ…ôn…ôman nu bar~…æu≈ãaan tu sakaj nanum nu mabur~…æawaj a r~…æumaan. . ƒßatidaaj tu nu nananuman a bar~…æu≈ãaan saan u sakaj r~…æ…ôpa ¶awan a duguan, itini i nipiwada tu ƒßitaj atu nipi ¶unus tu ƒßitajan a nikasasakamuan u a≈ãa≈ãan ku nuƒß…ôni. mikinkiw tina sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm nu bar~…æu≈ãaan a tar~…æakaw atu maƒßamin a kugajan, ajda ¶aaj tu ka pina ku misikiaj nu kanatar~…æan atu misa≈ãaaj tu sakaj ƒßitajan nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. . sakar~…æaƒßat nu r~…æikisi**** sumamad nu r~…æikisi**** sajawaj a sapir~…æ…ôn…ômaw nu bar~…æu≈ãaan tan…ô≈ã patar~…æaajaw ku sausi i ***** a s…ô ¶ian nu r~…æi-aw-na-tuo. ta-w…ôn-si. sakamusa ¶i nida tu nisimsiman " tan…ô≈ã i nananuman mu ¶ur~…æir~…æaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan". nika maƒßiniaj saan kutaw u " r~…æa î~ ° ¶usaj", sisa ¶aaj pisiki ¶i nida tu maƒßiniaj a pikur~…æitan. katukuƒß i kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, maƒßiniaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan par~…æa " ¶aaj kaw kapaƒßaj nu wajwajan" nu sakar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw duguan, ƒßakija ¶umudan tu mikuku≈ãaj i r~…æabu nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. . sabaw …ôn…ôm nu s…ô ¶ian, tat…ô≈ãaaj a imian nu sakaj nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan taƒß…ôkar~…æ tu. ¶ajr~…æimpi ¶war~…æ miƒß ¶aan , miasipaj nu sita≈ãaƒßaj a tad…ômaw nu in-kuo ¶i wi-r~…æ…ôn.puon a ¶udadan " mikinkiw atu misiki" sakamusa tu sapir~…æ…ôn…ômaw tu nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. ¶ajr~…æimtus…ôp miƒß ¶aan, sajawaj idaw ku sisur~…æitaj " tan…ô≈ã sakaj nanumaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan" " subm…ôribr~…æ…ô *…ôƒßi ¶r~…æ…ôs" u ir~…æu ¶ nu ƒß…ô-r~…æan in-kuo a tad…ômaw ¶i k…ô-ni-r~…æi-…ô î~ °-s.ja-pu-s…ô- ¶u≈ã,taj-puo-…ô ku patid…ô≈ãaj, midudu ¶aj tu a≈ãa≈ãan nu nipisikian, mi ¶uduƒß u tad…ômaw ku misakakawawaj. saan ku duma a tad…ômaw ujda u " sakaj sasa nu namum nu masuniaj a r~…æinr~…æin sa" ¶aaj kaw u tat…ô≈ãaaj a sakaj nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, idaw ku tusaaj nisumadan itida i ¶ajr~…æimr~…æus…ôp miƒß ¶aan atu ¶ajr~…æimtusip miƒß ¶aan itida i taj-u-s…ô nanuman mikinkiw. tus…ôps…ôptu miƒß ¶aan, in-kuo kusi taƒß…ôkar~…æ i tir~…æibi sakamusa "buir~…ædi≈ã tƒß…ô impossibr~…æ…ô", ¶i ma-k…ô.aj-d…ô-ƒßua- ¶…ô kusi sakamusa tu tawjaaj a nipisikian tu nipatid…ô≈ã nu tusaaj a tad…ômawan a taj-puo-…ô bar~…æu≈ãaan, mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶i mu ¶ur~…æir~…æ itida i ji-tun a duo-ni-banawan. ****, "(subm…ôribr~…æ…ô *…ôƒßi ¶r~…æ…ôs) "buir~…ædi≈ã tƒß…ô impossibr~…æ…ô"*, . "tan…ô≈ã i nanumaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, tan…ô≈ã miadiƒß tu sasa nu kitakidan a tuudan, nika sakaj nu ƒßitajan am…ôr~…æik kaadiƒßan tu. ¶ajr~…æimsipwar~…æ miƒß ¶aan, u kiwsama ¶i j…ô-ƒßan. wi-…ô- ¶in-s…ô ni ¶udadan " sapiasip nu tizinaan" "matƒß…ômati ¶ar~…æ magi ¶" saan tu sakaj r~…æ…ôn…ôman nu bar~…æu≈ãan nu ƒßitajan a nikakapaƒß: sakaja nu udipan: mutajda i dumaan nu ¶apian a kitakidan, ¶aaj ka adiƒß nu taw. sakaj anzi≈ã : u miubiaj atu kuku≈ã utiiƒß a tasasa miar~…æaw tu tuud nu bar~…æu≈ãaan: ka k…ôr~…æaƒßan atu pi ¶id…ôkan nu bar~…æi atu udad ¶aaj ka r~…æawr~…æaw nu sasaaj a bajuan tu **-** kun- ¶…ô, kasisur~…æ…ôdaan atu at…ôkakaj nu sur~…æ…ôdaan ¶aaj paka…ôdis tu bar~…æu≈ãaaj nu tad…ômaw, kanaƒßatu i timur~…æ war~…æi nu bajuan. idaw ku r~…æaƒß…ô ¶i miwawi…ôs tu ada nu kajgu≈ã, mip…ô ¶i î~ ° atu pa…ôn…ôp tu bar~…æu≈ãan.mi…ôdap tu mar~…æawaaj nu nanum atu mi ¶apiaj tu nanuman, najnai î~ ° ku sunisuni patajda tu tuudan. " . itini i r~…æikisi saajawaj nu mi ¶ukajmasaj nu ƒßitaj a mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan itini i amir~…æika tu nika sa ¶a ¶aj sa mar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw. amir~…æika nu j…ô-r~…æu tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan a ¶i ta-wi. pu-si-…ô ku patid…ô≈ãaj tu ƒßaj-kua-ƒßaw, ir~…æabu ¶a ¶aj ku tad…ômaw ku mipa ¶unaaj tu ƒßandur~…æu atu kur~…æupir~…æa. ¶ajpi ¶pi ¶r~…æim miƒß ¶aan, ina ƒßaj-kua-ƒßaw mid…ôbu≈ã mir~…æ…ôpa ¶aw tu i≈ã-kuo-ƒßun- ¶ia kajgu≈ã nu r~…æaw-i≈ã-ƒßaw "ƒßms …ôagr~…æ…ô", nika mad…ôm…ô ¶. itini i r~…æiksian mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶iaj namibakuƒßa ¶ tu bar~…æu≈ãaan itida i amir~…æika nu timur~…æ amis a nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan. ¶i ƒß…ô-zu…ô-s…ô.r~…æaw-s…ôn.ƒßan-r~…æi patid…ô≈ã tu ƒßan-r~…æi-ƒßaw pir~…æ…ôn…ôman nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, mika ¶awaj nu tad…ômaw war~…æu ku tad…ômaw, r~…æima…ôn nanaj ku sapa ¶una. i nu ajawan idaw ku mu ¶ur~…æar~…æaj nu sapibakuƒßa ¶ nu r~…æa ¶una, anu r~…æar~…æit…ômuƒß sa mabakuƒßa ¶ tu. ¶ajwar~…ær~…æimsip miƒßa ¶an tusa bur~…æad ¶ajpi ¶ d…ômiad r~…æabii siwaaj ku tuki, mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶i nida mabakuƒßa ¶ mar~…æ…ôn…ôm ku amisaj a ƒßaw-sa î~ °-tuo-ni-ƒßaw "uss ƒßousatoni ¶" nu ƒßu-wi-bar~…æu≈ãaan, nika ¶i nida mabakuƒßa ¶ tu mar~…æaadiju ¶ r~…æ…ôn…ôm satu. (ƒßms …ôagr~…æ…ô),***. . nu ajawan a ¶ajwar~…ær~…æimr~…æu miƒß ¶aan, fa-kuo mipad…ô≈ã tu sapip…ôn…ô ¶aw tu bar~…æi a kawawan misumad tu tad…ômaw, patid…ô≈ã tu sajawaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan tu ¶aaajaj kaw u tad…ômaw ku mikawawaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan "mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj tu nanum a ƒßaw". ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶siw miƒß ¶aan, buksi nu i≈ã-kuo ¶i ¶iw-s…ô. ¶ia-r~…æ…ô-t…ô î~ ° patid…ô≈ã tu "ƒßu-ƒßuo-ƒßaw", tanaju makaar~…æa tu ** mi, t…ôban u makimur~…æmur~…æaj a kakuan, tasaj a tapii≈ãan makimur~…æmur~…æaj nu kakuan. anu mu ¶ur~…æir~…æ i nanum u r~…æaƒßud ku sapi ¶uduƒß, anu mir~…æ…ôn…ôm tu u sasa≈ãasiban nu r~…æiwan a r~…æaƒßud, nu sajawaj a akutiaj nu sa ¶ur~…æi a mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. ********, . sabaw siwa a s…ô ¶i war~…æu a bataan nu miƒß ¶aan, kapaƒß kapaƒß ku nipisa≈ãan tu sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, mamin tu matin…ô≈ã ku kanakanatar~…æ tu tapa≈ãan. amir~…æika, i≈ã-kuo,fa-kuo,zu…ô-tin, ji-ta-r~…æi, d…ô-kuo atu …ô î~ °-kuo manamuƒß namin mikinkiw. ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶war~…æ miƒß ¶aan, i≈ã-kuo ir~…æu ¶ nu amir~…æika ¶i j…ô-ƒßan. ƒß…ôi-r~…æi-pu.ƒßuo-r~…æan mikabu tina kawawan. ¶ajsiws…ôps…ôp miƒß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…æad, amir~…æika sj…ôƒßu mi ¶akaj tu nipikinkiwan a sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm nu bar~…æu≈ãaan u ƒßuo-r~…æan-ƒßaw, mar~…æaamir~…æika nu kajgu≈ãan. namaƒßini, ƒßidasatu mar~…æakaj≈ãu≈ã nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. ¶ajwar~…æsiwwar~…æ miƒß ¶aan, fa-kuo ¶i ma-k…ô î~ °-si-mu. r~…æaw-puo-ƒßu saajawaj misa≈ãa tu tusaaj a udipan nu bar~…æu≈ãaan misa≈ãan " ji- ¶iaw- ¶in-ƒßau", misup…ôd tu nanum i r~…æabu nu tusaaj a tu≈ãduƒßan, sakapaƒßaj sa sapi ¶unus tu sakabawbaw. ujniƒßan mar~…æa su-…ô î~ ° pir~…æ…ôn…ôman nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. ********, .
S.FORM: == numilenemay i nanum nu balungaanÊΩõËâ¶ == milenemay i nanum nu balungaan, pangangan han u milenemay i nanum nu balungaan, taneng i nananuman muculilay nu balungaan. yadah ku masadumaay nu milenemay i nanum nu balungaan, caay namin kalecad, saadidiay u kikayay atu tusaay a tademaw ku pacunaay, pisakakawawan nu tukian a adidiay nu sapilenem piadihan, anu tabaki taneng mitupin tu pinaay nu lasubuan nu tademaw, matulin ku nuculilan nu balungan makaala tu tulu ‚Äìenem a buladan nu E'-luo-se baliyusan nu sapilenem tu nanum a balungaan. u udip nu balunga makakenih sa " angangan un hitay" adidi a tudi atu adidiay " masaadidi'tu nu milenemay tu nanum a balungaan, sapilenem nu kikayan" atu sakatasasa i nanum nu ziting a kikayan. sakay bayu nu sapilenem utiih a kiliman, sapilenem i nanum nu balungaan yu mahida idaw tu nu miculimekay mitupinay a balungaan. . tabakiay nu pileneman a balungaan u mamulmulay namin ku cuked, taban nu balunga idaw ku nipatideng tu sasedayan nu kakuan " sakaypaypay", sumamad pangangan han u " pitudawan", paypay u yadahay nu mapatelekay a masasalusalusay nu hekal, sumamad u masakayakayay, ilabu idaw ku sapatelay i hekal, tiyung han masuni tu, sapiadih tu batad nu dadingu atu sapikuwan naw a sangaan. . sakinacacay nu nikalepacawan, sapilenemaw i nanum nu balungaan sawsawni cukaymasan, mikawaw tu tabakiay nu kaygungan a angangangan, sakay miedis tu ada nu hitayan a balungaan atu sapilenemaw i nanum nu balungaan, sapidiputaw tu macapiay, mipeci' tu nipitengan, mikinsa atu sapaceba tu micidekay nu muculilay nu hitayan. milenemay nu balungaan alahican caay sipakayda i nu hitayan a micukaymas. mahida u sakay bayuan nu pikinkiwan, mamialaw tu tuu'dan, mikutkut tu sakay ilabuay nu nanuman, kesye pikiliman, sapidiputaw a tuudan, sapikilim miala, sakay sasa nu bayu misangan tu tabakiay nu telay, pacakayay tu dukuan, sakay nanum nu miliwkuay, sakaycudadan nu nipikisaan, u tada kalimucisangay a tademaw micukaymas tu sapileneman nu balungaan tu sakay nanum nu mabulaway a lumaan. . hatidaay tu nu nananuman a balungaan saan u sakay lepacawan a duguan, itini i nipiwada tu hitay atu nipicunus tu hitayan a nikasasakamuan u angangan ku nuheni. mikinkiw tina sapilenem nu balungaan a talakaw atu mahamin a kugayan, ayda caay tu ka pina ku misikiay nu kanatalan atu misangaay tu sakay hitayan nu balungaan. . sakalahat nu likisiÁôºÂ±ïÊ≠∑Âè≤ sumamad nu likisiÊó©ÊúüÊ≠∑Âè≤ sayaway a sapilenemaw nu balungaan taneng patalaayaw ku sausi i 15‚Äî16 a secian nu Li-aw-na-tuo. Ta-wen-si. sakamusa ci nida tu nisimsiman " taneng i nananuman muculilay nu balungaan". nika mahiniay saan kutaw u " la'cusay", sisa caay pisiki ci nida tu mahiniay a pikulitan. Katukuh i kalepacawan, mahiniay nu balungaan pala " caay kaw kapahay nu waywayan" nu sakalepacaw duguan, hakiya cumudan tu mikukungay i labu nu balungaan. . sabaw enem nu secian, tatengaay a imian nu sakay nanum nu balungaan tahekal tu. caylimpicwal mihcaan , miasipay nu sitangahay a tademaw nu In-kuo ci Wi-len.Puon a cudadan " mikinkiw atu misiki" sakamusa tu sapilenemaw tu nanum nu balungaan. caylimtusep mihcaan, sayaway idaw ku sisulitay " taneng sakay nanumay nu balungaan" " submerible vehicles" u iluc nu He-lan In-kuo a tademaw ci Ke-ni-li-e'-s.Ya-pu-se-cung,Tay-puo-e ku patidengay, miduducay tu angangan nu nipisikian, micuduh u tademaw ku misakakawaway. saan ku duma a tademaw uyda u " sakay sasa nu namum nu masuniay a linlin sa" caay kaw u tatengaay a sakay nanum nu balungaan, idaw ku tusaay nisumadan itida i caylimlusep mihcaan atu caylimtusip mihcaan itida i Tay-u-se nanuman mikinkiw. tusepseptu mihcaan, In-kuo kusi tahekal i tilibi sakamusa "Building the Impossible", ci Ma-ke.Ay-de-hua-ce kusi sakamusa tu tawyaay a nipisikian tu nipatideng nu tusaay a tademawan a Tay-puo-e balungaan, malaheci muculil itida i Yi-tun a Duo-ni-banawan. 16‰∏ñÁ¥Ä, "(submerible vehicles) "Building the Impossible"‰∏≠, . "taneng i nanumay nu balungaan, taneng miadih tu sasa nu kitakidan a tuudan, nika sakay nu hitayan amelik kaadihan tu. caylimsipwal mihcaan, u kiwsama ci Ye-han. Wi-e-cin-se nicudadan " sapiasip nu tizinaan" "Mathematical Magic" saan tu sakay leneman nu balungan nu hitayan a nikakapah: sakaya nu udipan: mutayda i dumaan nu capian a kitakidan, caay ka adih nu taw. sakay anzing : u miubiay atu kukung utiih a tasasa mialaw tu tuud nu balungaan: ka kelahan atu picidekan nu bali atu udad caay ka lawlaw nu sasaay a bayuan tu 25-30 kun-ce, kasisuledaan atu atekakay nu suledaan caay pakaedis tu balungaay nu tademaw, kanahatu i timul wali nu bayuan. idaw ku laheci miwawies tu ada nu kaygung, mipeci' atu paenep tu balungan.miedap tu malawaay nu nanum atu micapiay tu nanuman, naynai' ku sunisuni patayda tu tuudan. " . itini i likisi saayaway nu micukaymasay nu hitay a milenemay nu balungaan itini i Amilika tu nika sacacay sa malepacaw. Amilika nu Ye-lu tabakiay nu cacudadan a ci Ta-wi. Pu-si-e ku patidengay tu Hay-kua-haw, ilabu cacay ku tademaw ku mipacunaay tu handulu atu kulupila. caypicpiclim mihcaan, ina hay-kua-haw midebung milepacaw tu Ing-kuo-hun-cia kaygung nu law-ing-haw "HMS Eagle", nika mademec. Itini i liksian malaheciay namibakuhac tu balungaan itida i Amilika nu timul amis a nikalepacawan. ci He-zue-se.Law-sen.Han-li patideng tu han-li-haw pileneman nu balungaan, mikacaway nu tademaw walu ku tademaw, limaen nanay ku sapacuna. i nu ayawan idaw ku muculalay nu sapibakuhac nu lacuna, anu lalitemuh sa mabakuhac tu. caywallimsip mihacan tusa bulad caypic demiad labii siwaay ku tuki, malaheci nida mabakuhac malenem ku amisay a haw-sa'-tuo-ni-haw "USS Housatonic" nu hu-wi-balungaan, nika ci nida mabakuhac tu malaadiyuc lenem satu. (HMS Eagle),‰ΩÜÂ§±Êïó. . nu ayawan a caywallimlu mihcaan, Fa-kuo mipadeng tu sapipenecaw tu bali a kawawan misumad tu tademaw, patideng tu sayaway nu balungaan tu caaayay kaw u tademaw ku mikawaway nu balungaan "milenemay tu nanum a haw". caywalpicsiw mihcaan, buksi nu Ing-kuo ci Ciw-se.Cia-le-te' patideng tu "hu-huo-haw", tanayu makaala tu 15 mi, teban u makimulmulay a kakuan, tasay a tapiingan makimulmulay nu kakuan. anu muculil i nanum u lahud ku sapicuduh, anu milenem tu u sasangasiban nu liwan a lahud, nu sayaway a akutiay nu saculi a milenemay nu balungaan. Ê≠§ÂâçÁöÑ1863Âπ¥, . sabaw siwa a seci walu a bataan nu mihcaan, kapah kapah ku nipisangan tu sapilenem nu balungaan, mamin tu matineng ku kanakanatal tu tapangan. Amilika, Ing-kuo,Fa-kuo,Zue-tin, Yi-ta-li, De-kuo atu E'-kuo manamuh namin mikinkiw. caywalpicwal mihcaan, Ing-kuo iluc nu Amilika ci Ye-han. Hei-li-pu.Huo-lan mikabu tina kawawan. caysiwsepsep mihcaan sepat a bulad, Amilika syehu micakay tu nipikinkiwan a sapilenem nu balungaan u huo-lan-haw, malaAmilika nu kaygungan. namahini, hidasatu malakayngung nu balungaan. caywalsiwwal mihcaan, Fa-kuo ci Ma-ke'-si-mu. Law-puo-hu saayaway misanga tu tusaay a udipan nu balungaan misangan " yi-ciaw-cin-hau", misuped tu nanum i labu nu tusaay a tungduhan, sakapahay sa sapicunus tu sakabawbaw. uynihan mala Su-e' pileneman nu balungaan. 19‰∏ñÁ¥Ä80Âπ¥‰ª£, .

bar~…æu≈ãaan. jadaƒß ku masadumaaj nu mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj i nanum nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, ¶aaj namin kar~…æ…ô ¶ad, saadidiaj u kikajaj atu tusaaj a tad…ômaw ku pa ¶unaaj, pisakakawawan nu tukian a adidiaj nu sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm piadiƒßan, anu tabaki tan…ô≈ã mitupin tu pinaaj nu r~…æasubuan nu tad…ômaw, matur~…æin ku nu ¶ur~…æir~…æan nu bar~…æu≈ãan makaar~…æa tu tur~…æu *…ôn…ôm a bur~…æadan nu …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô bar~…æijusan nu sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm tu nanum a bar~…æu≈ãaan. u udip nu bar~…æu≈ãa makak…ôniƒß sa " a≈ãa≈ãan un ƒßitaj" adidi a tudi atu adidiaj " masaadidi î~ °tu nu mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj tu nanum a ¶u≈ã,taj-puo-…ô ku patid…ô≈ãaj, midudu ¶aj tu a≈ãa≈ãan nu nipisikian, mi ¶uduƒß u tad…ômaw ku misakakawawaj. saan ku duma a tad…ômaw ujda u " sakaj sasa nu namum nu masuniaj a r~…æinr~…æin sa" ¶aaj in-kuo kusi taƒß…ôkar~…æ i tir~…æibi sakamusa "buir~…ædi≈ã tƒß…ô impossibr~…æ…ô", ¶i ma-k…ô.aj-d…ô-ƒßua- ¶…ô kusi sakamusa tu tawjaaj a nipisikian tu nipatid…ô≈ã nu tusaaj a tad…ômawan a taj-puo-…ô "tan…ô≈ã i nanumaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, tan…ô≈ã miadiƒß tu sasa nu kitakidan a tuudan, nika sakaj nu ƒßitajan am…ôr~…æik kaadiƒßan tu. ¶ajr~…æimsipwar~…æ miƒß ¶aan, u kiwsama ¶i j…ô-ƒßan. wi-…ô- ¶in-s…ô ni ¶udadan " sapiasip nu tizinaan" "matƒß…ômati ¶ar~…æ magi ¶" saan tu sakaj r~…æ…ôn…ôman nu bar~…æu≈ãan nu ƒßitajan a nikakapaƒß: sakaja nu udipan: mutajda i dumaan nu ¶apian a kitakidan, ¶aaj ka adiƒß nu taw. sakaj anzi≈ã : u miubiaj atu kuku≈ã utiiƒß a tasasa miar~…æaw tu tuud nu bar~…æu≈ãaan: ka k…ôr~…æaƒßan atu pi ¶id…ôkan nu bar~…æi atu udad ¶aaj ka r~…æawr~…æaw nu sasaaj a bajuan tu **-** kun- ¶…ô, kasisur~…æ…ôdaan atu at…ôkakaj nu sur~…æ…ôdaan ¶aaj paka…ôdis tu bar~…æu≈ãaaj nu tad…ômaw, kanaƒßatu i timur~…æ war~…æi nu bajuan. idaw ku r~…æaƒß…ô ¶i miwawi…ôs tu ada nu kajgu≈ã, mip…ô ¶i î~ ° atu pa…ôn…ôp tu bar~…æu≈ãan.mi…ôdap tu mar~…æawaaj nu nanum atu mi ¶apiaj tu nanuman, najnai î~ ° ku sunisuni patajda tu tuudan. " . itini i r~…æikisi saajawaj nu mi ¶ukajmasaj nu ƒßitaj a mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan itini i amir~…æika tu nika sa ¶a ¶aj sa mar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw. amir~…æika nu j…ô-r~…æu tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan a ¶i ta-wi. pu-si-…ô ku patid…ô≈ãaj tu ƒßaj-kua-ƒßaw, ir~…æabu ¶a ¶aj ku tad…ômaw ku mipa ¶unaaj tu ƒßandur~…æu atu kur~…æupir~…æa. ¶ajpi ¶pi ¶r~…æim miƒß ¶aan, ina ƒßaj-kua-ƒßaw mid…ôbu≈ã mir~…æ…ôpa ¶aw tu i≈ã-kuo-ƒßun- ¶ia kajgu≈ã nu r~…æaw-i≈ã-ƒßaw "ƒßms …ôagr~…æ…ô", nika mad…ôm…ô ¶. itini i r~…æiksian mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶iaj namibakuƒßa ¶ tu bar~…æu≈ãaan itida i amir~…æika nu timur~…æ amis a nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan. ¶i ƒß…ô-zu…ô-s…ô.r~…æaw-s…ôn.ƒßan-r~…æi patid…ô≈ã tu ƒßan-r~…æi-ƒßaw pir~…æ…ôn…ôman nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, mika ¶awaj nu tad…ômaw war~…æu ku tad…ômaw, r~…æima…ôn nanaj ku sapa ¶una. i nu ajawan idaw ku mu ¶ur~…æar~…æaj nu sapibakuƒßa ¶ nu r~…æa ¶una, anu r~…æar~…æit…ômuƒß sa mabakuƒßa ¶ tu. ¶ajwar~…ær~…æimsip miƒßa ¶an tusa bur~…æad ¶ajpi ¶ d…ômiad r~…æabii siwaaj ku tuki, mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶i nida mabakuƒßa ¶ mar~…æ…ôn…ôm ku amisaj a ƒßaw-sa î~ °-tuo-ni-ƒßaw "uss ƒßousatoni ¶" nu ƒßu-wi-bar~…æu≈ãaan, nika ¶i nida mabakuƒßa ¶ tu mar~…æaadiju ¶ r~…æ…ôn…ôm satu. (ƒßms …ôagr~…æ…ô),***. . nu ajawan a ¶ajwar~…ær~…æimr~…æu miƒß ¶aan, fa-kuo mipad…ô≈ã tu sapip…ôn…ô ¶aw tu bar~…æi a kawawan misumad tu tad…ômaw, patid…ô≈ã tu sajawaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan tu ¶aaajaj kaw u tad…ômaw ku mikawawaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan "mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj tu nanum a ƒßaw". ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶siw miƒß ¶aan, buksi nu i≈ã-kuo ¶i ¶iw-s…ô. ¶ia-r~…æ…ô-t…ô î~ ° patid…ô≈ã tu "ƒßu-ƒßuo-ƒßaw", tanaju makaar~…æa tu ** mi, t…ôban u makimur~…æmur~…æaj a kakuan, tasaj a tapii≈ãan makimur~…æmur~…æaj nu kakuan. anu mu ¶ur~…æir~…æ i nanum u r~…æaƒßud ku sapi ¶uduƒß, anu mir~…æ…ôn…ôm tu u sasa≈ãasiban nu r~…æiwan a r~…æaƒßud, nu sajawaj a akutiaj nu sa ¶ur~…æi a mir~…æ…ôn…ômaj nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. ********, . sabaw siwa a s…ô ¶i war~…æu a bataan nu miƒß ¶aan, kapaƒß kapaƒß ku nipisa≈ãan tu sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm nu bar~…æu≈ãaan, mamin tu matin…ô≈ã ku kanakanatar~…æ tu tapa≈ãan. amir~…æika, i≈ã-kuo,fa-kuo,zu…ô-tin, ji-ta-r~…æi, d…ô-kuo atu …ô î~ °-kuo manamuƒß namin mikinkiw. ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶war~…æ miƒß ¶aan, i≈ã-kuo ir~…æu ¶ nu amir~…æika ¶i j…ô-ƒßan. ƒß…ôi-r~…æi-pu.ƒßuo-r~…æan mikabu tina kawawan. ¶ajsiws…ôps…ôp miƒß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…æad, amir~…æika sj…ôƒßu mi ¶akaj tu nipikinkiwan a sapir~…æ…ôn…ôm nu bar~…æu≈ãaan u ƒßuo-r~…æan-ƒßaw, mar~…æaamir~…æika nu kajgu≈ãan. namaƒßini, ƒßidasatu mar~…æakaj≈ãu≈ã nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. ¶ajwar~…æsiwwar~…æ miƒß ¶aan, fa-kuo ¶i ma-k…ô î~ °-si-mu. r~…æaw-puo-ƒßu saajawaj misa≈ãa tu tusaaj a udipan nu bar~…æu≈ãaan misa≈ãan " ji- ¶iaw- ¶in-ƒßau", misup…ôd tu nanum i r~…æabu nu tusaaj a tu≈ãduƒßan, sakapaƒßaj sa sapi ¶unus tu sakabawbaw. ujniƒßan mar~…æa su-…ô î~ ° pir~…æ…ôn…ôman nu bar~…æu≈ãaan. ********, .
